2026-04-29FINCanada Pension Plan Investment Board ActAppointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Canada Pension Plan Investment BoardAppointment of Elio Luongo of Burnaby, British Columbia, to be a director of the Board of Directors of the Canada Pension Plan Investment Board, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of three years.N/A
act: Canada Pension Plan Investment Board Act
subject: Appointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Canada Pension Plan Investment Board
precis: Appointment of Elio Luongo of Burnaby, British Columbia, to be a director of the Board of Directors of the Canada Pension Plan Investment Board, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of three years.
